caption: v5 preserves the Glot500-style corpus, tokenizer, continued MLM, and evaluation flow while isolating the novelty to appended embedding-row initialization.
The main v5 tokenizer reduces tokens per word for 29 of 30 audited languages. `dzo_Tibt` is highlighted as the remaining target-side fertility regression.
FVT initialization lowers zero-step MLM proxy NLL compared with random resize and mean initialization, especially on the v5 target group.
Coverage is reported explicitly so unavailable target-language task data is not confused with negative downstream performance.
